description_long: This house features a rectangular main structure with a flat roof and a combination of gray and white exterior walls. The property includes a green lawn area adjacent to the main building, as well as a paved driveway leading to a garage or carport. There are several small outbuildings or utility structures on the lot, and a long, straight fence or wall extends from one side of the property. The windows are arranged in a regular, symmetrical pattern along the main facade, and the entryway is accessible via a paved path. The overall design is modern and functional, with minimal decorative elements and a focus on clean lines.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with a gray and white exterior, green lawn, paved driveway, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main facade, green lawn, and the long fence extending to the right.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the house, the lawn, and the driveway leading to the garage area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, utility structures, and the continuation of the fence.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the lawn, driveway, and the main building's flat roof.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple main door with a paved path, no porch or columns, minimal overhang.
